title: BondIssue
description: A series of bonds issued by HDC to fund its lending — the investor-facing side of the corporation. HDC is one of the nation's largest municipal housing bond issuers (Housing Revenue Bonds; Sustainable Development Bonds). CRITICAL OWNERSHIP FINDING: HDC publishes no bond dataset on NYC Open Data; investor disclosure (Official Statements, financial statements, SDB annual reports) lives on the FEDERAL MSRB EMMA platform as documents, and the only City open-data trace is OMB's 'Debt Issuance by Issuer' (n5n4-5k5r), where HDC appears merely as an 'Issuer Name' value. This schema reconciles the OMB columns + EMMA disclosure fields into an HDC-owned resource.

x-source.note: HDC appears only as an 'Issuer Name' value in OMB's Debt Issuance by Issuer; primary disclosure is on federal EMMA, not a City system.

seriesId.description: Bond series identifier ('Series Name' on OMB's dataset), e.g. 'Multi-Family Housing Revenue Bonds, 2024 Series A'.

issuerName.default: New York City Housing Development Corporation
issuerName.description: Issuer ('Issuer Name'). For this resource always HDC.

newMoneyOrRefunding.description: Whether the issue is new money or a refunding ('New Money/Refunding').

taxExemptParAmount.description: Tax-exempt par amount ('Tax Exempt Par Amount').

sustainable.description: Whether the series is designated a Sustainable Development Bond (SDB).

ratings.description: Credit ratings on the issue (e.g. AA / Aa2), as published on the Invest pages.

officialStatementUrl.description: Link to the Official Statement (typically hosted on the Invest pages and MSRB EMMA).

emmaUrl.description: MSRB EMMA disclosure URL for the issue.
